mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, title, source_type, source_ref, status, mailbox_id, workspace_path, default_provider, default_model, active_run_id, pending_question_message_id, last_activity_at, created_at, updated_at FROM conversations WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY last_activity_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.project_id AS project_id, p.name AS project_name, p.slug AS project_slug, c.title, c.status, c.last_activity_at, c.active_run_id, c.pending_question_message_id, c.updated_at FROM conversations c INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = c.project_id WHERE p.status = 'active' ORDER BY c.last_activity_at DESC, c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT id, project_id, title, source_type, source_ref, status, mailbox_id, workspace_path, default_provider, default_model, active_run_id, pending_question_message_id, last_activity_at, created_at, updated_at FROM conversations WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET status = 'running', active_run_id = #{activeRunId}, pending_question_message_id = NULL, last_activity_at = #{lastActivityAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE conversations SET status = #{status}, active_run_id = NULL, pending_question_message_id = NULL, last_activity_at = #{lastActivityAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
